commands.notes: Captured the GitHub Actions backend failure showing dashboard platform tests missing runtime tables system_user_session and system_setting in CI.
Targeted platform backend tests pass after migrating the runtime schema required by DashboardService.GetSummary.
Local machine cannot create disposable MySQL databases with this DSN because root@localhost is denied; this is an environment gap, not the CI root cause.
Windows local environment lacks cgo, so race-mode parity with Ubuntu CI must be confirmed on GitHub Actions.

affectedSubgraph: platform dashboard tests -> dashboard service -> authsession runtime helpers -> runtime tables
graphChecks.notes: The repair is confined to test fixture setup and does not alter dashboard service production code.

runtimeGap: Full CI parity still depends on GitHub Actions rerunning Backend Tests on Linux with MySQL and cgo-enabled race mode.
knownGaps: This environment cannot create disposable MySQL test databases with the repository CI DSN because local root credentials differ from GitHub Actions.
Race-mode validation requires Linux/cgo and will be confirmed by the PR backend workflow.
